name: remotion-studio-project
description: Bundled Remotion starter for BOT-032 Remotion Studio. rm-build copies this per project, installs the official remotion-best-practices skill, and authors above it. ALL @remotion/* are pinned to ONE version (version skew is the #1 render break) — re-pinned to the runtime's `npm view remotion version` by render.sh at render time.
